description: You are a teacher preparing a database for a history and statistics lesson on the Titanic. Using the raw CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/titanic.csv, create a local SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/titanic.db containing a table named 'passengers' with the following columns: PassengerId, Survived, Pclass, Name, Sex, Age, SibSp, Parch, Ticket, Fare, Cabin, and Embarked. Use Python's built-in 'csv' and 'sqlite3' modules to import all records, ensuring that commas within quoted fields (like the Name column) are handled correctly. Calculate the survival rate percentages for 1st class and 3rd class passengers and save the labeled results to /home/ga/Documents/survival_summary.txt. Do not use external libraries like pandas.
